subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Spirit is the highest and supreme development of the soul. Soul is the material or outer self—the Mind. Mind is the action of the Soul's powers.
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @relationship of the soul to the body, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman]
